prestazioni: Garrett GT2867R turbocharger upgrade for the B5244T5 (2.4L turbo I5) engine, paired with a custom 3.5" stainless steel downpipe featuring a 200-cell catalytic converter by Ferrita Performance to maintain emissions compliance while reducing backpressure by 40%

Haltech Elite 2500 standalone ECU with custom CAN bus integration for the C70 R's ME7.0.1 engine management, featuring a 4-bar MAP sensor, flex-fuel compatibility, and a bespoke ignition timing map optimized for 98 RON fuel with E85 blends up to 50%

KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with adjustable damping (16-way rebound, 12-way compression) and custom spring rates (8kg/mm front, 10kg/mm rear) to counteract the C70 R's 1,500kg+ weight, paired with polyamide bushings from Powerflex (PFF80-611) for the rear subframe to eliminate flex
estetica: Volvo C70 R-specific 'R-Design' widebody conversion kit by Heico Sportiv, featuring carbon fiber front fenders with integrated vents, rear quarter panels, and a revised rear bumper with a diffuser-style lower section to accommodate the 255/35/18 Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires

OEM+ LED headlight retrofit using Hella 90mm Bi-Xenon projectors with custom DRL strips and a sequential turn signal module (VLEDS V6-SM) integrated into the C70 R's factory housing, paired with a gloss black grille insert from Volvo's Polestar 1 parts bin

Custom interior roll cage by Custom Cages UK, constructed from T45 steel with a 6-point design and bolt-in rear strut brace, finished in Volvo's 'Nordic Light' metallic paint (code 462) and wrapped in Alcantara by Recaro for the C70 R's optional Sport seats (part #31416806)
